title: Simply Just Optimized
description: The Simply Just Optimized (a fork of SO) modpack aims to provide a base of the best optimization mods available, configured for the maximum performance achievable
body:
![fabric](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/supported/fabric_vector.svg) ![forge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/unsupported/forge_vector.svg) ### this video you can see it in action! (Note:with tweaked settings you can get more!) ### How to instail the modpack (Make sure you download from this url Not the SOP one ) The Simply Just Optimized (a fork of SO) modpack aims to provide a base of the best optimization mods available, configured for the maximum performance achievable. Thanks to countless hours of research, it often outperforms other optimization solutions in benchmarks, and when it doesn't, I investigate why to improve it further. SO is explicitly built with simplicity and high maintainability in mind; the goal is to make for a reflection of the bleeding edge of Minecraft optimization at the time, and that's what the focus is on. That means little to no quality-of-life or visual enhancements are included in the pack by default - you are expected to add any non-optimization mods you want on your own. This also means it's able to recieve mod updates with new performance improvements quickly, and update to new Minecraft versions in a matter of (sometimes)hours!
Forge? note in works but might come soon
Notice: 26 is taking while to get all mods updated! Click "follow" to be let known when it drops! ## Tested on a 2017 MacBook Air (8GB RAM) — 70+ FPS in survival 100 FPS+ On superflat "Low end hardware"! Your New Laptop or computer should peak more!
